TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: kawas tay 1918, ryax sa tay 15 nqu tay 2, Allan Arbus, squliq na Bunge'. (wal mhuqil sa kawas tay 2013) pinqbaqan nya Allan Arbus mqwas biru sa DeWitt Clinton pqwsan biru seneng, sa The Bronx, U.S. qnxan nya(qyanax nya) Allan Arbus htagan beh sa New York City, cyux maki yotay qutux ngasal. hiya ga sraral mqwas biru beh gocyu na polawkes. Arbus smoya balay hngzyang qwas. Allan Arbus maki tay kawas 1941 msqun ki Diane Nemerov, maki tay kawas 1969 t'alax. maki 2 la'iy, Amy Arbus, Doon Arbus. Allan Arbus maki tay kawas 1977 msqun ki Mariclare Costello. Mariclare uzi hiya ga m'engi. maki 1 la'iy, Arin Arbus. Allan Arbus ru Diana cyux maki sazing laqi. mintzyuwaw nya Allan Arbus hiya ga m'engi. t'aring sa kawas 1972, mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na engi ru mqwas. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, allan arβus~ɕ, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. (wal mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) pinqβaqan nja allan arβus~ɕ mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa *ewitt ʦ~ʨlinton pqws~ɕan βiru s~ɕeneŋ, s~ɕa tħe βronx, u.s~ɕ. qnxan nja(qjanax nja) allan arβus~ɕ ħtaɣan βeħ s~ɕa new jork ʦ~ʨitj, ʦ~ʨjux maki jotaj qutux ŋas~ɕal. ħija ɣa s~ɕraral mqwas~ɕ βiru βeħ ɣoʦ~ʨju na polawkes~ɕ. arβus~ɕ s~ɕmoja βalaj ħŋzjaŋ qwas~ɕ. allan arβus~ɕ maki taj kawas~ɕ **** ms~ɕqun ki *iane nemero*, maki taj kawas~ɕ **** tʔalax. maki * laʔij, amj arβus~ɕ, *oon arβus~ɕ. allan arβus~ɕ maki taj kawas~ɕ **** ms~ɕqun ki mariʦ~ʨlare ʦ~ʨos~ɕtello. mariʦ~ʨlare uzi ħija ɣa mʔeŋi. maki * laʔij, arin arβus~ɕ. allan arβus~ɕ ru *iana ʦ~ʨjux maki s~ɕaziŋ laqi. mintzjuwaw nja allan arβus~ɕ ħija ɣa mʔeŋi. tʔariŋ s~ɕa kawas~ɕ ****, mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na eŋi ru mqwas~ɕ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
S.FORM: kawas tay 1918, ryax sa tay 15 nqu tay 2, Allan Arbus, squliq na Bunge'. (wal mhuqil sa kawas tay 2013) pinqbaqan nya Allan Arbus mqwas biru sa DeWitt Clinton pqwsan biru seneng, sa The Bronx, U.S. qnxan nya(qyanax nya) Allan Arbus htagan beh sa New York City, cyux maki yotay qutux ngasal. hiya ga sraral mqwas biru beh gocyu na polawkes. Arbus smoya balay hngzyang qwas. Allan Arbus maki tay kawas 1941 msqun ki Diane Nemerov, maki tay kawas 1969 t'alax. maki 2 la'iy, Amy Arbus, Doon Arbus. Allan Arbus maki tay kawas 1977 msqun ki Mariclare Costello. Mariclare uzi hiya ga m'engi. maki 1 la'iy, Arin Arbus. Allan Arbus ru Diana cyux maki sazing laqi. mintzyuwaw nya Allan Arbus hiya ga m'engi. t'aring sa kawas 1972, mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na engi ru mqwas. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, allan arβus~ɕ, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. (wal mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) pinqβaqan nja allan arβus~ɕ mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa *ewitt ʦ~ʨlinton pqws~ɕan βiru s~ɕeneŋ, s~ɕa tħe βronx, u.s~ɕ. qnxan nja(qjanax nja) allan arβus~ɕ ħtaɣan βeħ s~ɕa new jork ʦ~ʨitj, ʦ~ʨjux maki jotaj qutux ŋas~ɕal. ħija ɣa s~ɕraral mqwas~ɕ βiru βeħ ɣoʦ~ʨju na polawkes~ɕ. arβus~ɕ s~ɕmoja βalaj ħŋzjaŋ qwas~ɕ. allan arβus~ɕ maki taj kawas~ɕ **** ms~ɕqun ki *iane nemero*, maki taj kawas~ɕ **** tʔalax. maki * laʔij, amj arβus~ɕ, *oon arβus~ɕ. allan arβus~ɕ maki taj kawas~ɕ **** ms~ɕqun ki mariʦ~ʨlare ʦ~ʨos~ɕtello. mariʦ~ʨlare uzi ħija ɣa mʔeŋi. maki * laʔij, arin arβus~ɕ. allan arβus~ɕ ru *iana ʦ~ʨjux maki s~ɕaziŋ laqi. mintzjuwaw nja allan arβus~ɕ ħija ɣa mʔeŋi. tʔariŋ s~ɕa kawas~ɕ ****, mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na eŋi ru mqwas~ɕ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
